subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1911-09-28 in London
subcodes.first_line: all of you here are sisters. Bodily relationships may pass; even two sisters may be inimical to each other, but the spiritual relationship is eternal
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @compassion; kindness, @assistance to the poor and lowly; the orphan; the sick
